subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! The verses have been sent down in such wise that all the pens in the world, and they that possess knowledge of calculation, cannot reckon them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله قد نزلت الآیات علی شان لم یحصها اقلام العالم و لا من عنده علم الحساب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer
